alert_text: prod-postgres-1 is not accepting connections. Replicas are healthy but writes are failing across the platform.
k8s nodes in pool app-pool are showing MemoryPressure=True and have evicted 15 pods in the last 10 minutes.
p99 latency on /api/search has spiked to 4x baseline for 8 minutes. No deploy correlation visible.
5xx rate on the public API is 7%; top stack trace is from PaymentService.process throwing NullPointerException.
GitHub secret-scanning alert: a Stripe live secret key was committed to a public repo 4 minutes ago.
SSO log shows user maya@corp signed in from two countries 12 minutes apart, both MFA-approved.
The nightly user-engagement Airflow DAG failed; the dbt test for unique customer_id reported 47 duplicates.
Dashboard 'revenue_today' is showing yesterday's value; its freshness SLA is 15 minutes and max(updated_at) is 4 hours stale.
EBS volume mounted on prod-app-12 is at 97%; filling at ~3 GB/min from application logs.
CoreDNS pods are restarting repeatedly; service-to-service traffic cluster-wide is intermittently failing DNS.
Writes against the primary order database are timing out. Read replicas remain available.
OOMKilled events have spiked on the checkout deployment; node memory utilization is at 94%.
Tail latency on the inventory API has been climbing for 30 minutes; trace breakdown points to Postgres query times.
Error budget for the auth service has burned 40% in the last hour; 502s from the upstream identity provider.
AWS access key found in a public Docker image layer pushed to Docker Hub by an employee account.
